plan.title: Combine QUICK-START Case G and Case H into one session for big-jump upgrades

narratives.Description: On a big-jump upgrade where AGENTS.md is stale (Case G) and pre-cutover artifacts exist (Case H), QUICK-START.md halts after the Case G refresh and forces a second agent session for the Case H migration. This story adds a combined Case G+H remediation path so both run in one session, since the migration re-reads filesystem state and does not need the refreshed AGENTS.md in agent context.
narratives.ImplementationPlan:
Add a combined-remediation subsection to the QUICK-START.md decision-tree file that detects the joint stale-AGENTS.md and pre-cutover condition and orders the AGENTS.md refresh ahead of the migration script run.
Add a contract test under tests/content asserting QUICK-START.md documents the Case G+H joint path and that the post-remediation state matches running the cases separately.
narratives.UserStory: As a deft operator doing a big-jump upgrade, I want Case G and Case H to complete in one session, so that I avoid an unnecessary agent-session round-trip.

items.title: Given a project with stale AGENTS.md and pre-cutover artifacts, when an agent follows QUICK-START.md, then it refreshes AGENTS.md and runs migration in one session before emitting a single restart instruction.

narrative.Acceptance: Given a project with stale AGENTS.md and pre-cutover artifacts, when an agent follows QUICK-START.md, then it refreshes AGENTS.md and runs migration in one session before emitting a single restart instruction.

items.title: When the combined path completes, then the resulting AGENTS.md and migrated vbrief lifecycle match the byte-state produced by running Case G and Case H separately.

narrative.Acceptance: When the combined path completes, then the resulting AGENTS.md and migrated vbrief lifecycle match the byte-state produced by running Case G and Case H separately.

items.title: A contract test validates that QUICK-START.md documents the Case G+H combined remediation ordering.

narrative.Acceptance: A contract test validates that QUICK-START.md documents the Case G+H combined remediation ordering.

expected_outputs: QUICK-START.md documents the Case G+H combined path
contract test for the joint condition

references.title: Issue #1114: enhancement(quick-start): combine Case G + Case H into one session for big-jump upgrades
